testcase.name: Successful checkout workflow
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Sauce Demo Page....................................passed When user logs in with the correct credentials..............................passed And adds items to the cart and clicks checkout..............................passed And enters checkout information with first name "Manasa" last name "Barakam" and zip code "600040".passed Then the order confirmation message "Thank you for your order!" should be displayed.passed
